title: Invisible Armor Recipe
description: Crafting recipe to turn any armor piece invisible, or visible again
body:
# Invisible Armor Crafting Recipe 

Turn any armor piece completely invisible.

![Example for invisible armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cc6cTA8L/images/e5b868aced119885a574691bba41612188757be3.png)



Works fully server side!
## Recipe Invisible Armor
- Any armor piece with phantom membrane
  
![Crafting Recipe Invisible Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cc6cTA8L/images/ff5dbbc22be50be6c41f04278d286d555112fae9.png)

## Recipe Visible Armor
- Turn any invisible armor piece visible again with a piece of paper

![Visible Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cc6cTA8L/images/d213824d6743466fc9f3e6d960ba2cde7464a907.png)
